name: HDFC Regalia Gold Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 4 Reward Points per ₹150 spent on all retail purchases
10X Reward Points on Smartbuy portal (flights, hotels, Amazon, Flipkart)

cappedCategories.description: 10X rewards capped at 15,000 bonus points per calendar month

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹25,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas
insurance.purchaseProtection: Up to ₹2,50,000 for 90 days from purchase

additionalBenefits: Access to HDFC Bank Dining Privileges
pros: Solid lounge access for a premium card
Reasonable annual fee with achievable waiver threshold
cons: 3.5% foreign currency markup is on the higher side
Base reward rate is average at 4 RP per ₹150
10X cap is lower than Infinia (15,000 vs 25,000 bonus points)
idealFor: Frequent domestic travellers who value lounge access
SmartBuy users looking for good rewards on travel bookings
Aspirants looking to upgrade to HDFC Infinia or Diners Club Black

faqs.question: How is HDFC Regalia Gold different from the old HDFC Regalia?
faqs.answer: The HDFC Regalia Gold replaced the older HDFC Regalia card in 2023. It has a lower annual fee of ₹2,500 (vs ₹2,500 for old Regalia) but slightly reduced benefits. The 10X SmartBuy cap is 15,000 bonus points per month.

faqs.question: Can I get the annual fee waived?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹2,500 annual fee is waived if your spending exceeds ₹3,00,000 in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: How many lounge visits do I get?
faqs.answer: You get 12 complimentary domestic lounge visits and 6 international lounge visits per year through Priority Pass.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade from Regalia Gold to Infinia?
faqs.answer: Yes, HDFC Bank may offer an upgrade to Infinia or Diners Club Black if you maintain high spending (typically ₹8-10 lakh+ annually) on the Regalia Gold for 12-18 months.
